# Harness Engineering Template

> A reusable development harness for AI-assisted software projects.

## Start Here

- [Agent entry map](AGENTS.md): canonical operating rules for coding agents.
- [Project plan](docs/project/PLANS.md): current project goals, roadmap, and stack overrides.
- [Harness guide](docs/HARNESS_GUIDE.md): human-readable setup and operating manual.

## Design Rules

- [Core beliefs](docs/design-docs/core-beliefs.md): architecture principles and coding guardrails.
- [Tech stack](docs/design-docs/tech-stack.md): default technology choices.
- [Agent roles](docs/design-docs/agent-roles.md): role contracts for planner, architect, implementer, reviewer, verifier, recorder, memory, and release.
- [Execution modes](docs/design-docs/execution-modes.md): supported OS, CLI, CI, and API-key workflows.
- [L4.5 auto-fix policy](docs/design-docs/auto-fix-policy.md): bounded source/test patching, verification, and rollback rules.
- [L5 autonomy policy](docs/design-docs/l5-autonomy-policy.md): opt-in interactive/API orchestration, budgets, checkpoints, and approval gates.
- [Memory governance](docs/design-docs/memory-governance.md): memory layer update rules.

## Agent Capabilities

- [Skills directory](skills/README.md): portable skill package structure.
- [Code review skill](skills/code-review/SKILL.md): review behavior and output contract.
- [Tool registry](tools/registry.yaml): declared local and MCP tool inventory.

## Automation

- [CI workflow](.github/workflows/ci.yml): project detection, tests, and build checks.
- [Security workflow](.github/workflows/security.yml): vulnerability and secret scanning.
- [Harness CLI](tools/harness-cli/index.js): OS-neutral command layer for check, tickets, verification, completion, and API-key agent calls.
- [Legacy context loader](scripts/load-context.sh): Unix pipeline context printer; keep in sync with Harness CLI context bundle rules when context sources change.
- [Start task](scripts/start-task.sh): create a task worktree and EXEC_PLAN.
- [Verify task](scripts/verify-task.sh): run project verification.
- [Complete task](scripts/complete-task.sh): archive completed task context.
